author: y4rr
content: Done. Added Step 1 item 7: 'Verify stdlib API stability before applying recommended migrations.' Names the failure mode caught in test #4 (audit recommended ThreadId::as_u64() as 'stable since 1.75', actual rustc rejected with E0658). Includes the explicit guidance to NOT bypass via #[allow(unstable_features)] (Step 3 #1) or unilaterally bump MSRV to nightly (Step 4). Framework now considered converged after 4 test dispatches, 7 total refinements.
